title: Half-Price Games
detail: Half price games every Sunday and Wednesday. Valid in-store only.

title: Buck-a-Shuck: $1 Oysters
detail: Buck-a-Shuck Mondays: $1 oysters during lunch service, from 11 AM.

title: $5 Dolla' Fridays
detail: $5 cover, $5 Ultras, $5 wines, $6 Surfsides, half-price deck starters, rotating DJs.

title: Happy Hour
detail: Tuesday–Friday happy hour, 5–7 PM — $8 meatballs with marinara and drink specials.

title: Wine Not Monday: Half-Priced Wine Bottles
detail: Half-priced bottles of wine with the purchase of an entree, every Monday.

title: $30 All-You-Can-Eat Pork Feast
detail: Feast with a Mission Mondays: all-you-can-eat pork feast, 10% donated.

title: $9 After 9
detail: Every Tuesday night: $9 ping pong after 9 PM.

title: Friday Dance Party: $5 Love City Lager
detail: Classic disco and soulful house dance party every Friday from 10 PM — $5 Love City Lager.
